title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Notification issued by the Revenue Department regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team. | Sending of notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No – F.09(07)-REV/ACQ/VI/25 dated, 26/03/2026 regarding public hearing with the land owners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team in connection with acquisition of land for widening of Existing Road from Women’s College Hostel Gate to Power House Chowmohani under Mouja Agartala, Sheet No. 14, Sadar, West Tripura. | 26/03/2026 | 31/05/2026 | |
| Tripura in connection with acquisition of land for strengthening & widening of Railway station road from Siddhi Ashram Chowmohani to NH-08 (Bye-pass) at mouja-Badharghat sheet no. 5(4)/p under Sadar Sub-Division, West Tripura District. | Sending of Notification vide No. F.09(06)-REV/ACQ/VI/25/1/1282106/2026 dated 6-03-2026 issued by the Revenue Deptt, Govt. of Tripura in connection with acquisition of land for strengthening & widening of Railway station road from Siddhi Ashram Chowmohani to NH-08 (Bye-pass) at mouja-Badharghat sheet no. 5(4)/p under Sadar Sub-Division, West Tripura District. | 24/03/2026 | 07/04/2026 | |
| Notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No F.09(08)-REV/ACO/VI/25 dated, 02/01/2026 regarding public hearing with the landowners | Notification issued by the Revenue Department vide No F.09(08)-REV/ACO/VI/25 dated, 02/01/2026 regarding public hearing with the landowners by the Social Impact Assessment Study Team in connection withacquisition of land for development of Agartala City (Old Motor Stand PetrolPump) under Monja Agartala, Sheet No. 19/p.
